raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids fazzija us
to KUNGU: To Engeli redse-
dains/ kas tohs Laudis katwe:
Rangi/ es esmu grehkojs/ un es
efmu noseedsts/ bet ko irr fchahs
Avis darrijuschas? lai tawa
Rohka prett man irr/ un prett
mann Tehwa Namun.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nahze Gads tai
Deena pee Dahwida/ un fazzija
us to: Eijs augfchn/ un ustaifi
tam KUNGAM weenuAltari us
Arawna ta Jebusitera Klohn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad gahje Dahwids us
augfchu pehz Gada Wahrdiu/ itt
ka tas KUNGS bij pawehlejs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Arawnus skattijahs/
un redfeja to Kehnizu ar Jaweem
Kalpeem pee winna nahfani/ un
Arawnus isgahje/ un fiannijahs
preeksch taKehnixa ar Jawu Wai-
gu pee Semnes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Arawnusfazzija: Ka-
pehz nahf mans Kungs tas
Kehnisch pee Jawu Kalpa? un
Dahwids fazzija: Scho Klohnii
no tewim pirkt/ ka es tam KUN-
GAM weenu Altari darru/ ka
ichi Mohziba no teem Laudim
mittejahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Arawnus us
Dahwidu: Lai mans Kungs tas
Kehnisch nemm un uppure/ ka
winnam patihk. Redf/ sche irr
Wehrfschi par Dedsamo-Uppuri/
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Scho wiſfu dewe ta
Kehnisch Arawnus tam Kehn-
nam: Un Arawnus fazzija us t
Kehniau: Lai tam KUNGAM
tairam Deewam labs Prahtsi
pee terwis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas Kehnisch fazz
ja us Arawnu: Ne/ bet es pirzi
no tewis to pirkschu/jo es ne gri-
bu tam KUNGAM manna-
Deewam Dedsamo-Uppuri
welti uppureht. Ta pirke Da-
wids to Klohnii un tohs Web-
chus par peezdemsits fudral-
Sihkteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids ustaifija t-
tam KUNGAM weenu Altar-
un uppureja Dedsamo-Uppurus
un Pateikschanas-Uppurus. T-
tappe tas KUNGS tai Semm-
falihdsinahts/ un ta Mohzil-
mittejahs no Israëta.
Tahs ohtras Samueka Grahma-
tas Gals.
"
    }
